testcase.name: test_salary_must_be_positive

failure.message: AssertionError: 1 rows have invalid salary: id name salary 5 5 Eve 0 assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = len( id name age salary department annual_bonus\n5 5 Eve 35.0 0 FINANCE 0.0)

testcase.failure: tests\test_business_rules.py:6: in test_salary_must_be_positive assert len(invalid) == 0, ( E AssertionError: 1 rows have invalid salary: E id name salary E 5 5 Eve 0 E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = len( id name age salary department annual_bonus\n5 5 Eve 35.0 0 FINANCE 0.0)

testcase.name: test_no_duplicate_rows

failure.message: AssertionError: Found 1 fully duplicate rows assert np.int64(1) == 0

testcase.failure: tests\test_duplicates.py:8: in test_no_duplicate_rows assert duplicate_count == 0, (f"Found {duplicate_count} fully duplicate rows") E AssertionError: Found 1 fully duplicate rows E assert np.int64(1) == 0

testcase.name: test_no_duplicate_ids

failure.message: AssertionError: Duplicate IDs found: [2] assert 1 == 0 + where 1 = len([2])

testcase.failure: tests\test_duplicates.py:13: in test_no_duplicate_ids assert len(duplicate_ids) == 0, (f"Duplicate IDs found: {duplicate_ids}") E AssertionError: Duplicate IDs found: [2] E assert 1 == 0 E + where 1 = len([2])

testcase.name: test_no_nulls_in_required_columns

failure.message: AssertionError: Column 'age' has 1 null value(s) after transformation assert np.int64(1) == 0

testcase.failure: tests\test_nulls.py:12: in test_no_nulls_in_required_columns assert null_count == 0, ( E AssertionError: Column 'age' has 1 null value(s) after transformation E assert np.int64(1) == 0

testcase.name: test_age_null_filled_with_median

failure.message: AssertionError: 1 null ages in source were NOT filled assert np.int64(1) == 0

testcase.failure: tests\test_nulls.py:21: in test_age_null_filled_with_median assert remaining_nulls == 0, ( E AssertionError: 1 null ages in source were NOT filled E assert np.int64(1) == 0
